headline: Western Digital (WDC) Valuation Check After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: What Western Digital’s Recent Performance Tells You Right Now With no single fresh headline driving Western Digital (WDC) today, the focus for investors is the share price itself, sitting at $304.90 after a 2.8% decline in the latest session. That move comes after a 13.4% gain over the past week, an 8.3% rise over the past month, and a 74.2% return over the past 3 months, putting recent momentum front and center for anyone tracking the stock. headline: Western Digital Ethics Win And HDD Contracts Meet AI Storage Momentum
summary: Western Digital has been named one of the World's Most Ethical Companies for 2026 by Ethisphere. The company has secured long term HDD supply agreements, with capacity reportedly booked through 2026. Following the spinoff of its Flash business, Western Digital is focused on high capacity HDDs serving AI driven cloud storage demand. For investors watching NasdaqGS:WDC, this mix of ethics recognition and business reshaping comes after a very large 1 year share price gain and a more than 7x...
